_meta.description: Known contributor registry — forum and community members with credibility weights
_meta.weight_scale: 0-10 where 10=factory manual trust (never assigned to individuals), 7=max individual cap, 5=established expert, 2=unvetted member
_meta.notes: Weights represent the contributor's individual credibility modifier. Combined with source and post-type modifiers per scoring-algorithm.md.

Charlie-III.weight_justification: Forum administrator since 2013. 11K+ posts. Broad diagnostic knowledge, frequently first responder on technical questions. Specific expertise in plug compatibility and throttle body service.

chase206.weight_justification: Super Moderator since 2008. Deep hands-on race build experience (Lemons). Technical depth in engine, suspension, and custom fabrication. Already tagged as priority contributor in forum/thread-index.json.

eagleprime.weight_justification: base(2) + posts>=1000(+1) + expertise_overlap(+1) + maintainer_identified(+1) = 5. Active member since 2022, 1673+ posts. Demonstrates diagnostic skill (identified rod knock from audio, engine teardown assessment at 293K km). Active in member profiles and troubleshooting threads.

The_Evenger.weight_justification: base(2) + posts>=1000(+1) + tenure>=5yr(+1, joined 2015 = 11yr) + expertise_overlap(+1) + maintainer_identified(+1) = 6. Active since 2015, 2433+ posts. Broad diagnostic and electrical knowledge: CEL/MAF/O2 troubleshooting, security system installs (Crimestopper SP-502), HVAC manual-to-auto conversion, body/collision assessment. Car nicknamed 'Neptune'.

_template._comment: Copy this block and rename the key to add a new contributor. See scoring-algorithm.md Section 2 for initial weight calculation.
